page_title: PeakFit: Your Personal Coach, Anytime, Anywhere

hero.headline: Transform Your Potential, One Rep at a Time
hero.subheadline: Personalized fitness coaching that adapts to your goals, schedule, and progress. No gym required, no excuses accepted.

sections.heading: Your Fitness, Your Rules
sections.content: PeakFit isn't just another fitness app. It's a comprehensive coaching platform that understands your unique fitness journey. Whether you're looking to build muscle, lose weight, or boost performance, our AI-powered coaching adapts to your progress in real-time.
sections.image_prompt: Professional athlete training in a modern, minimalist gym with orange and black accents

sections.heading: Real People, Real Results
sections.content: Our community proves that with the right guidance, transformation is possible. From busy professionals to weekend warriors, PeakFit members are crushing their fitness goals and redefining their potential.
sections.image_prompt: Collage of diverse fitness transformations showing before and after results

features.title: Personalized Workout Plans
features.description: AI-driven coaching that creates custom workout plans tailored to your fitness level, goals, and available equipment.

features.title: Real-Time Progress Tracking
features.description: Automatic tracking of your workouts, nutrition, and body metrics. See your progress and stay motivated with data-driven insights.

features.title: Expert Guidance On-Demand
features.description: Connect with certified fitness coaches for personalized advice, form corrections, and motivational support.

transformation_stories.name: Alex Rodriguez
transformation_stories.story: From desk job to marathon runner. Lost 35 lbs, improved endurance by 200%, and discovered a passion for fitness with PeakFit.

transformation_stories.name: Emma Chen
transformation_stories.story: Balanced motherhood and fitness goals. Gained lean muscle, increased energy, and found confidence through personalized coaching.
transformation_stories.result_metrics: 15 lbs muscle gain, 3x weekly workout consistency

monthly.title: Monthly Flex
monthly.description: Full access, cancel anytime. Perfect for those testing their fitness journey.

yearly.title: Annual Commitment
yearly.description: Best value. Save 40% and unlock premium features for serious fitness enthusiasts.

images.name: hero_image
images.prompt: Dynamic fitness scene with a young, muscular athlete performing a high-intensity workout in a modern gym, wearing black and orange athletic wear, with dramatic lighting

images.name: app_interface
images.prompt: Close-up of a hand holding a smartphone displaying the PeakFit app interface, showing workout plan, progress graph, and coaching chat, with orange and black color scheme

images.name: transformation_collage
images.prompt: Split-screen fitness transformation collage showing diverse individuals' before and after fitness results, with motivational orange overlay
